name: input0
desc: Input0 — A macOS voice input tool: hold a hotkey to record, release to transcribe locally via STT, refine with LLM, and auto-paste into the active text field.
descFull: Input0 — A macOS voice input tool: hold a hotkey to record, release to transcribe locally via STT, refine with LLM, and auto-paste into the active text field.
